title: Sanglui

{{Quote|Half of this planet... ''us included...'' would be liquidated... instantly... if the Imperial forces discovered ''who'' the contact is—!|Sanglui|<ref name="world" />}}
'''Sanglui''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Squalris]] who secretly led a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The proprietor of a successful import-export business, Sanglui cultivated the image of a high-society fop, which served as cover for his clandestine activities. He was rarely seen without his beloved pet [[husk lizard]], [[Farnak]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Our contact is extremely high in the government of this planet... and he's our only hope of diverting the incredible wealth... of Vorzyd 5 away from the Empire, and back to the people! We must keep his identity secret... at any risk!|Sanglui|<ref name="world" />}}
A [[Squalris]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ifmix VI]], Sanglui eventually migrated to the "Gambler's World" of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], where he set up an import-export business that had become extremely lucrative by [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Sanglui's success and wealth allowed him access to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world's most exclusive social circles, as well as a gleaming office in the center of the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Efavan/Legends|Efavan]]. But while Sanglui had courted a reputation as an insubstantial dandy concerned mostly with flashy clothes and fine foods, that was by design: Sanglui had a secret life as the leader of Efavan's [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell, working behind the scenes to return the planet's wealth to its people.<ref name="geonosis" />

In 1 ABY, Vorzyd V was visited by a pair of prominent Rebel leaders, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who intended to meet with an unidentified Rebel sympathizer who was placed highly in the planet's government. Sanglui was aware of the contact's identity—Vorzyd V [[President/Legends|President]] [[Natala Vanden]]—but kept her name a tightly held secret, fearing that if the knowledge of who she was got out it would lead to a vicious reprisal from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The Squalris received a signal from Vanden requesting a meeting soon after Skywalker and Organa arrived on the planet, but insisted that she would meet with just one of them. To determine who would go, Sanglui called a meeting with Skywalker, Organa and a local Rebel agent named [[Paxin]], and the four drew straws to meet Vanden: Skywalker, ever lucky, drew the short straw.<ref name="world" />

==Personality and traits==
Sanglui was a staple among the high-class social circles of Vorzyd V, whose denizens considered him a glutton and dandy with a friendly and docile personality. It was a reputation that Sanglui was glad to reinforce, as he was never seen without colorful expensive clothes, jeweled rings, and his beloved pet [[husk lizard]] [[Farnak]]. However, Sanglui used that persona to hide his true ambition: as the leader of the Rebels in Efavan, Sanglui dreamed of seizing the Empire's wealth on Vorzyd V and redistributing it to the planet's people.<ref name="geonosis" /> Extremely committed to the Rebel cause, Sanglui was willing to absorb any risk to protect Alliance interests on Vorzyd V.<ref name="world" /> In situations where Sanglui had to defend himself, he was known to wield a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[ELG-3A blaster pistol/Legends|ELG-3A blaster pistol]].<ref name="geonosis" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sanglui made his first and only appearance in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity in ''[[Gambler's World]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] story arc written and illustrated by [[Russ Manning]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="world" />
